text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho is here. It's a crucial race
for Mejiro Ryan to display her true prowess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's also the race long coveted by her dear friend,
Mejiro McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm done with my warm-ups. It's just about time to
head to the paddock.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Together, we've done everything possible
to prepare for today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But McQueen is staking everything on these
3,200 meters...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: It's going to be a tough fight.
choice_data_list:
Now that you mention it, I haven't seen her
around.

Now that you mention it, I haven't seen her
around.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
She probably won't say hi today. She didn't call
me up yesterday either.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna go greet everyone at the paddock real
quick and—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Here's to a good race today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to use all my might out there and win,
fair and square.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My top priority is to fulfill my long-held dream.
However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I also want to win against my respectable rival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's barely any difference in status left
between them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is Ryan's first senior-year G1 race against
Mejiro McQueen. Regardless of who wins, it'll be
a spectacular race.
